text:
While mailing lists are slowly losing steam, there are some gems present that are painful to find even with targeted google searches.  So, I've largely mirrored the R list-servs from <https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/> and wrapped it in a better/searchable format. (One notable downside is the sheer number of messages means we're needing a dynamic backend so a slight hosting overhead.)

<https://r-mailing-lists.thecoatlessprofessor.com/>

(Note: non-ASCII symbols are showing up as a `?` , e.g. curly quotes, to fix this I'd likely need to do a full scrape of the existing HTML pages or gently chat with who maintains the mailman instance for R to see if I can get a raw mbox archive.)

attachments.text: Searchable archive of R community mailing lists
attachments.title: Home | R Mailing Lists

text: Nice. Feel free to reach out to Martin Maechler who used to "own" all the lists and is the point person for the (slow) move away from ETH Zuerich who, not unlike many other universities, are slowly getting out of the 'we do our own email admin' business.
